title: 100 ChatGPT Prompts for Content Creators — Direct Promo
script:
[0s] I went from spending 3 hours on content ideas to 20 minutes — here's the exact tool.

[4s] It's a pack of 100 ChatGPT prompts built specifically for content creators.

[7s] We're talking: video ideas, YouTube titles, podcast outlines, Instagram captions, email subject lines, SEO descriptions — all of it.
[On-screen: Video Ideas / Titles / Captions / Email / SEO]

[14s] You don't need the paid version of ChatGPT.
It works with the free version, Claude, and Gemini.

[18s] These aren't copy-paste fluff prompts.
Every single one is engineered to give you a specific, usable output in under 60 seconds.

[23s] Nine dollars. Instant download. You'll use it today.

[27s] Link in my bio and TikTok Shop — go grab it.
[On-screen: $9 Instant Download — TikTok Shop ⬇]
caption: 3 hours of content planning → 20 minutes. This $9 prompt pack did that for me 👇 100 ChatGPT prompts for creators — video ideas, titles, captions, email, SEO. Instant download. Works with free ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini. Link in bio + TikTok Shop 🛒
